text:
Created attachment 209099
Error screen dump

Drivers fail to load for the Mellanox ConnectX®-4 Lx EN network interface card MCX4621A (Supermicro OEM version AOC-URN4-m2TS)
The card works perfectly in Linux, and I have updated to the latest firmware.

The driver reports mlx5_core attach returned 6
(See screenshot)

I cant find anything on the forum.

Kind Regards
Peter
